MaterialEditor.graphPath.uiname: data path to graph that's being edited

imageEditor.imageUser.image.ready.description: Is the image ready for use

mesh.triCount.description: Total number of triangles in the mesh

nodeViewer.graphPath.uiname: data path to graph that's being edited

object.drawMode.description: How the object is drawn in the viewport

objects[n].drawMode.description: How the object is drawn in the viewport

scene.tools.boxmodel.drawPoints.description: Draw every vertex as a billboard point

scene.tools.boxmodel.drawWireframe.description: Draw all edges as a dim wireframe overlay

scene.tools.boxmodel.xray.description: Draw the overlays through the mesh

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopo.edg.description: Number of edges to split/collapse per run

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopo.max.description: Maximum quad tree grid subdivision level

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopo.rep.description: Number of times to run topology engine

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopo.val.description: Number of edges around vertices to aim for

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopoSC.c.description: Collapse edges shorter than this fraction of the target

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopoSC.d.description: How often dyntopo remeshes along the stroke, independent of brush dab spacing (fraction of 2·radius; 0 = every dab)

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopoSC.e.description: Target edge length (units depend on Detail Mode)

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopoSC.g.description: Relax the target outward from the brush center (0 = uniform)

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.dynTopoSC.m.description: Max splits per dab (0 = unlimited; default 1024 keeps large dabs ~25fps+ at 5M tris)

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.smoothProj.description: How much smoothing should project to surface

scene.tools.sculptcore.brush.smoothRadiu.description: Multiply brush radius by this factor for smoothing

scene.tools.sculptcore.drawPolyGroupEdge.description: Draw poly-group boundary edges (off by default; updates each dab)

scene.tools.sculptcore.dynTopo.collapseR.description: Collapse edges shorter than this fraction of the target

scene.tools.sculptcore.dynTopo.dynTopoSp.description: How often dyntopo remeshes along the stroke, independent of brush dab spacing (fraction of 2·radius; 0 = every dab)

scene.tools.sculptcore.dynTopo.edgeSize.description: Target edge length (units depend on Detail Mode)

scene.tools.sculptcore.dynTopo.grade.description: Relax the target outward from the brush center (0 = uniform)

scene.tools.sculptcore.dynTopo.maxSplits.description: Max splits per dab (0 = unlimited; default 1024 keeps large dabs ~25fps+ at 5M tris)

settings.autosaveMaxBackups.description: Number of rotating autosave backups to keep

settings.autosaveToProjectDir.description: Write backups next to the open project (vs. into .sculptcore/autosave)

settings.featureFlags.sculptcore_auto_de.description: Auto-compact mesh DRAM layout at stroke end when fragmented (dyntopo)

settings.featureFlags.sculptcore_gpu_bru.description: Run eligible global brushes (kelvinlet) on the GPU when dyntopo is off
Also run the grab brush on the GPU (off until soak; needs GPU Brushes on)
Run GPU-eligible dabs on both paths and diff them (CPU stays authoritative)

settings.featureFlags.sculptcore_multire.description: Multiresolution subdivision sculpting: the LiteMesh multires panel + level ops (experimental)

settings.featureFlags.sculptcore_sculpt_.description: Sculpt-layer stack: the LiteMesh layer panel + edit-target sculpting (experimental)

settings.featureFlags.sculptcore_select_.description: Prefer an op's own selected domain over a derived one; when off, merge instead

settings.featureFlags.sculptcore_vdm_scu.description: Vector-displacement sculpting: the LiteMesh VDM panel + Draw-brush texel splatting (experimental)

view3d.render.minSamples.description: Minimum samples to render before drawing to screen
